group_description: Manages fabrication and assembly operations; owns machine guarding, hot work, and production floor hazards.
Responsible for planned and corrective maintenance of all plant equipment; owns LOTO, working at heights, and electrical isolation hazards.
Oversees site-wide health, safety, and environmental compliance; leads incident investigation and CAPA management.
Manages product quality inspection and non-conformance reporting; owns NCR-triggered CAPA actions.
Handles inbound raw materials and outbound finished goods; owns forklift operations and racking inspection hazards.
Responsible for process engineering, capital projects, and pressure system integrity; owns MOC and pressure vessel hazards.
Manages workforce training, competency records, and HR compliance; supports EHS in training gap CAPAs.
Manages all inbound and outbound logistics, picking, packing, and dispatch; owns forklift-pedestrian conflict and manual handling hazards.
Responsible for forklift servicing, racking repairs, and facility maintenance; owns LOTO and working at heights hazards.
Leads site safety programme, fire safety, and emergency preparedness; manages CAPA actions for warehouse incidents.
Manages outbound shipment scheduling and loading dock operations; owns dock safety and vehicle interface hazards.
Responsible for site access control and perimeter security; owns emergency evacuation and visitor management.
Operates chemical blending, formulation, and packaging lines; owns vapour exposure, flammable liquid handling, and process safety hazards.
Responsible for receipt, storage, transfer, and disposal of raw chemicals and finished products; owns spill response and hazmat transport hazards.
Services process equipment, pipework, and instrumentation; owns hot work permits, confined space entry, and LOTO hazards.
Manages process safety management, COSHH assessments, and regulatory compliance for chemical operations.
Conducts batch quality testing and manages product specification compliance; raises NCRs for out-of-spec batches.
Responsible for process design, instrumentation, and capital modifications; owns pressure relief and ventilation system design.
Operates CNC machining, grinding, and finishing lines; owns machine guarding, cutting fluid exposure, and noise hazards.
Maintains all CNC and precision equipment; owns electrical isolation and mechanical failure prevention.
Leads health and safety compliance for precision manufacturing; manages hearing conservation and chemical hygiene programmes.
Manages dimensional and surface quality inspection; raises CAPAs for machining process deviations.
Handles parts receipt and finished goods dispatch; owns forklift and racking inspection hazards.
Manages process engineering and tooling qualification; owns MOC and coolant system design hazards.
Manages competency records and training compliance for precision manufacturing workforce.
Manages high-throughput inbound and outbound logistics; owns forklift-pedestrian hazards and shift fatigue risks.
Responsible for forklift fleet servicing and facility upkeep; owns LOTO and vehicle maintenance hazards.
Leads safety programme for logistics operations; manages fire safety and manual handling CAPA actions.
Manages outbound loading and carrier coordination; owns dock leveller and loading platform hazards.
Controls site access and perimeter security; supports emergency evacuation planning.
Operates PCB assembly, soldering, and electronics testing lines; owns solder fume, ESD, and ergonomic hazards.
Maintains production equipment and clean-room systems; owns electrical isolation and HVAC maintenance hazards.
Manages chemical hygiene, solder fume monitoring, and waste disposal compliance for electronics manufacturing.
Manages electronic component inspection and test failure analysis; raises CAPAs for systematic production defects.
Handles sensitive electronics components and ESD-controlled storage; owns packaging and handling hazards.
Manages process engineering and equipment qualification for electronics assembly.
Manages workforce ergonomics programme and occupational health monitoring for assembly workers.
Operates bulk chemical transfer, blending, and storage operations; owns process safety, vapour cloud, and explosion hazards.
Manages receipt, storage, and transfer of acids, alkalis, and petrochemical intermediates; owns spill, fire, and HAZMAT hazards.
Services pressure vessels, pipework, and safety instrumentation; owns hot work, confined space, and pressure isolation hazards.
Manages PSM programme, HAZOP compliance, and regulatory reporting for bulk chemical operations.
Manages raw material and product batch quality testing; owns laboratory chemical exposure hazards.
Responsible for pressure system design, PSV sizing, and process safety engineering; owns MOC and HAZOP hazards.
Operates structural steel fabrication, welding, and heat treatment; owns hot work, heavy lifting, and weld fume hazards.
Maintains fabrication equipment, cranes, and pressure test rigs; owns LOTO, working at heights, and high-pressure system hazards.
Leads site safety programme for heavy fabrication; manages confined space entry, weld fume monitoring, and CAPA management.
Manages weld inspection, NDT, and pressure vessel code compliance; raises CAPAs for non-conforming welds.
Handles heavy steel stock, consumables, and finished vessel dispatch; owns crane and rigging hazards.
Manages vessel design, pressure calculations, and code compliance; owns engineering change and pressure relief system hazards.
Manages welding certifications, trade qualifications, and mandatory competency records for the heavy manufacturing workforce.
Manages foundation, structural, and civil construction activities; owns excavation, formwork collapse, and concrete hazards.
Operates cranes, excavators, and concrete equipment; owns mobile plant collision and overload hazards.
Manages construction site safety including working at heights, confined space, and subcontractor safety oversight.
Manages all subcontractor approvals, inductions, and performance monitoring; owns subcontractor safety compliance hazards.
Manages project schedule, method statements, and engineering drawings; owns design change and temporary works hazards.
Manages receipt, put-away, picking, and dispatch for the southern regional warehouse; owns forklift and manual handling hazards.
Responsible for forklift servicing and racking integrity inspections; owns vehicle maintenance and fall-from-height hazards.
Leads safety programme and fire prevention for the Coimbatore facility; manages CAPA actions for minor incidents and near misses.
Manages outbound shipment documentation and loading dock operations; owns dock safety and driver interface hazards.
Controls facility access and emergency response coordination for the Coimbatore site.
Corporate function managing group-wide EHS policy, audit programme, and regulatory compliance reporting.
Group HR function managing workforce policies, training governance, and competency frameworks across all sites.
Manages office facilities, reception, and corporate building management; owns ergonomic, fire, and evacuation hazards.
Manages IT infrastructure and systems including the EHS software platform; owns data security and business continuity risks.
